title: ESMA publishes report on the quality and use of data
text:
Back to Overview
News
ESMA publishes report on the quality and use of data
ESMA publishes report on the quality and use of data
09.05.25
•
Supervision and Regulation
ESMA published its fifth report on the quality and use of data on April 30, 2025. The report provides information on how the data collected is used by the authorities in the EU and gives an insight into the measures taken to ensure data quality.
The report presents specific examples of data use, ranging from market surveillance to supervision and enforcement. A recent example is ESMA's reuse of existing data to reduce the reporting burden (i.e. the use of MIFIR transaction data to calculate transparency and volume caps)
Similarly, ESMA published the Data Quality Engagement Frameworks (DQEFs) together with a matrix showing the key dimensions of data quality in each framework (DQEF). These DQEFs are important to formalize the exchange between the individual supervisory authorities and ESMA and to create a consistent and comprehensive approach to ensuring data quality.
ESMA12-1209242288-856 Report on Quality and Use of Data - 2024
